name: Yuan Jing
description: The Divine Foresight, one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Although his appearance may be one of indolence, he is more meticulous than seemingly meets the eye. He does not consider saving a situation from the brink of disaster to be a show of wisdom, and is thus fastidious with routine affairs to avoid any potential problems. name: Aku
description: Aku was cast out of her village as a sacrifice to the Devil King Greol; however, as she is being chased through the forest by Greol, she comes to a clearing where she encounters a mysterious man. This man defeats the Devil King with a single knife, causing Aku to become frightened for her life. The man assures her that she has nothing to worry, he introduces himself as Hakuto Kunai. description: Himiko Agari is introduced as a shy insecure girl. She also runs a ramen shop review blog and considers herself a "ramen expert."

description: Jeremy is childish and very reckless. He gets very angry when someone tries to harm his sister Roxana Agriche. Because he grew up in a loveless house, he craves his older half-sister's affection and gets easily jealous when someone takes her attention away from him.

name: Mayu Arita
description: Mayu is a student who is a huge fan of the idol group C.H.A, of which Harada is a member. She is a happy go lucky girl who is also a bit of a klutz. Her death was what would be called a freak accident, where while entering the bath she slipped on a bar of soap lying on the floor, hit her head and died instantly.

name: Mikleo
description: __Height:__ 165 cm A young seraph who was raised with Sorey since infancy. They are like brothers, and are best friends. But he also thinks of Sorey as a rival, so they get into arguments every so often. He believes his role is to calmly assess Sorey’s behavior and offers frank advice. Due to Sorey’s influence, he is also interested in the ancient ruins. He utilizes water-based seraphic artes.
